name: wanxiangzhen
description: wanxiangzhen: multi-agent opencode coordinator — DAG task graph + git worktree isolation + ff-only linear merge

scripts.ci: npm run build-and-test && npm run e2e
scripts.build-and-test: dotnet fable wanxiangzhen.fsproj --outDir build && rm -f build/fable_modules/.gitignore && cp build-package.json build/package.json && mkdir -p build/e2e/harness && cp e2e/*.js build/e2e/ && cp e2e/harness/*.js build/e2e/harness/ && sed -i 's|../../e2e/harness.js|./harness.js|g' build/e2e/Tests.js && node tests/runner.js
scripts.e2e: dotnet fable wanxiangzhen.fsproj --outDir build --noCache && rm -f build/fable_modules/.gitignore && cp build-package.json build/package.json && mkdir -p build/e2e/harness && cp e2e/*.js build/e2e/ && cp e2e/harness/*.js build/e2e/harness/ && sed -i 's|../../e2e/harness.js|./harness.js|g' build/e2e/Tests.js && if [ "$OPENCODE_E2E" = "1" ]; then echo 'OPENCODE_E2E=1 → opencode serve mode'; else export WANXIANGZHEN_E2E_INPROCESS=1; fi && node tests/runner.js --e2e
